constraints.reason: Every runtime operation must have tenant scope.
Replay linkage is required when execution emits replayable state.
Role guest mapped to canonical RBAC envelope.

interventions.title: Workflow authorization
interventions.explanation: Validates that the tenant and session can execute the requested orchestration scope.

interventions.title: Orchestration restrictions
interventions.explanation: Applies domain and lifecycle restrictions before runtime execution proceeds.

interventions.title: Tenant isolation
interventions.explanation: Restricts runtime visibility, replay, metrics, billing, and governance data to the tenant boundary.

interventions.title: Tenant orchestration limits
interventions.explanation: Checks demo, developer, professional, and enterprise orchestration limits.

interventions.title: Drone airspace governance
interventions.explanation: Applies UTM, Remote ID, DGCA, MAVLink, geofence, and mission governance readiness.

interventions.title: Emergency escalation
interventions.explanation: Routes safety override, operational halt, or emergency escalation through governance checkpoints.

interventions.title: Restricted-zone governance
interventions.explanation: Blocks or escalates execution when restricted zones or protected operating envelopes are detected.

interventions.title: Standards-aware enforcement
interventions.explanation: Coordinates regulatory and interoperability readiness without claiming formal certification.

interventions.title: Replay authorization
interventions.explanation: Controls replay package visibility, reconstruction access, and replay lineage authorization.

interventions.title: Audit compliance
interventions.explanation: Ensures policy, replay, escalation, and runtime decisions remain audit reconstructable.
